page: OVHcloud c2-120 is a compute-optimized server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs powered by an Intel Core Processor based on the Haswell architecture running at a clock speed of 3.0 GHz. The system is equipped with 120.0 GB of RAM, providing 3.75 GB of memory per core. Local storage consists of a bundled 400 GB SSD, and the instance includes a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps alongside one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Benchmark data shows average performance across most standard compute and memory tasks. The single-core stress-ng CPU performance is 1527.67, while the multi-core score reaches 49032.04. Memory bandwidth tests reveal strong performance for small cached blocks at 3545.25 GB/sec, though large block uncached read and write speeds fall into the average tier at 113.21 GB/sec and 38.36 GB/sec respectively. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression is a notable strength, registering at 253.18 GB/sec. However, the server exhibits weak to poor performance in LLM text generation tasks, with the 7B model generating only 6.29 tokens per second.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the c2-120 offers dedicated physical cores without hyperthreading, ensuring predictable compute performance for workloads sensitive to resource sharing. The bundled 400 GB SSD and 10 Gbps network baseline provide a balanced resource density for compute-bound applications. This server is suited for multi-threaded decompression, static web serving, compiling software, and database operations, but is not recommended for LLM text generation or GPU-accelerated workloads.
description: The OVHcloud c2-120 is a compute-optimized server instance featuring 32 dedicated physical Intel cores running at 3.0 GHz with no hyperthreading. It is configured with 120.0 GB of RAM, a bundled 400 GB local SSD, and a 10 Gbps baseline network interface. Benchmark results position this instance in the average tier for general compute, with a PassMark CPU score of 40620.12 and a multi-core Geekbench score of 11504.0. It demonstrates strong performance in cached memory bandwidth and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, though it exhibits weak capabilities in LLM text generation. The c2-120 is designed for compute-heavy workloads such as software compilation, static web serving, and database operations that benefit from dedicated, non-shared CPU resources.
og_description: OVHcloud c2-120 is a compute-optimized server with 32 dedicated Intel cores, 120 GB RAM, and a 400 GB SSD, delivering balanced performance for multi-threaded applications and web serving.
meta_description: OVHcloud c2-120 is a compute-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated Intel cores, 120 GB RAM, and a 400 GB SSD for predictable compute workloads.
tagline: A dedicated 32-core compute-optimized server with bundled SSD storage and high-speed networking for predictable multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated physical Intel cores running at 3.0 GHz with no hyperthreading
120.0 GB of system memory and a bundled 400 GB local SSD
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with one public IPv4 address
Strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and cached memory bandwidth
Suited for software compilation, static web serving, and database operations
